reviews.comment:
Cada vez que voy a la madrugada a cargar nafta a esa estación es un desastre , un montón esperando a que el playero se digne a atenderte , deplorable , y eso que es Automóvil Club Argentino

(Translated by Google)
Every time I go to that station in the early morning to fill up with gas, it's a disaster. A huge line of people waits for the attendant to deign to serve you. It's deplorable, especially since it's an Automóvil Club Argentino station.
